chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appln. No.S-902 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA-7919/2016 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing. 26.10.2016. Mr. Khadim Hussain Leghari, Advocate alongwith applicants. = 1. Granted. 2&3. It appears from the office note that Crime No.40/2016 in which the applicants seek interim pre-arrest bail comes within the territorial jurisdiction of Hon’ble High Court of Sindh, Circuit Court at Larkana and this Court lacks territorial jurisdiction to entertain this application for granting pre- arrest bail, therefore, instant application for grant of pre-arrest bail is converted into protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, both the applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 07(seven) days from today to appear before Circuit Court, Larkana, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand) each with P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have effect on expiry of 07 days i.e. upto 01.11.2016 or on the date when the applicants surrender themselves before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Shahid
